_comment: AoA modded-biome spawn fix (nether remainder): NetherEx/MonsterPlus/Born in Chaos/EndermanOverhaul nether mobs hard-code vanilla nether biome IDs, so they miss modded nether biomes (Incendium, BetterNether, EternalNether, NetherEx, BWG, RU). Nether sub-biome tags (crimson/soul/basalt) are not populated consistently across those mods, so #minecraft:is_nether is the only reliable target; the mods' original vanilla sub-biome spawns still place them correctly in vanilla nether.
